---
# Source for the marginalia-geometry diagram (build-marginalia.sh).
# Uses margin-geometry directly so inner/outer far + separation are symmetric
# (inner.sep == outer.sep == 0.3in), unlike _anatomy.qmd which drives geometry
# through margin/grid. Body blocks are identical to _anatomy.qmd.
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.75in
      bottom: 0.75in
    margin-geometry:
      inner:
        far: 0.6in
        width: 0.811in
        separation: 0.3in
      outer:
        far: 0.6in
        width: 1.5in
        separation: 0.3in
    page-numbering: "1"
    keep-typ: true
---

::: {.column-page}
```{=typst}
#block(fill: rgb("#b9cfe2"), width: 100%, height: 1.5cm, radius: 1pt)
```
:::

```{=typst}
#let para(h) = {
  block(fill: rgb("#d6d6d6"), width: 100%, height: h, radius: 1pt, breakable: true)
  v(0.5em)
}
#para(3.0cm)
#para(2.6cm)
```

::: {.column-margin}
```{=typst}
#block(fill: rgb("#cfcfcf"), width: 100%, height: 3.6cm, radius: 1pt)
```
:::

```{=typst}
#para(3.2cm)
#para(2.4cm)
#para(2.8cm)
#para(2.6cm)
#para(8.0cm)
```
